## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run security:scan`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate`
- [ ] Database migrations reviewed and tested when applicable
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, message bodies, or production identifiers added
- [ ] Render environment and rollout notes updated when configuration changed
